mapper.sql: report_id, reporter_user_id, target_type, target_id, reason_category, detail, evidence_file_ids, report_status, review_result_status, disposition_action, reviewer_admin_id, review_remark, review_time, close_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_info ( reporter_user_id, target_type, target_id, reason_category, detail, evidence_file_ids, report_status, review_result_status, disposition_action, reviewer_admin_id, review_remark, review_time, close_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{reporterUserId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reasonCategory}, #{detail}, #{evidenceFileIds}, #{reportStatus}, #{reviewResultStatus}, #{dispositionAction}, #{reviewerAdminId}, #{reviewRemark}, #{reviewTime}, #{closeTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE report_info SET reporter_user_id = #{reporterUserId}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, reason_category = #{reasonCategory}, detail = #{detail}, evidence_file_ids = #{evidenceFileIds}, report_status = #{reportStatus}, review_result_status = #{reviewResultStatus}, disposition_action = #{dispositionAction}, reviewer_admin_id = #{reviewerAdminId}, review_remark = #{reviewRemark}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM report_info WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM report_info WHERE report_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
